notes.embedding_coverage: Limited embedding coverage in vzysk category (3 of 48 published articles have embeddings). Zero scores reflect insufficient comparable vectors, not confirmed uniqueness. Structural analysis shows 7 H2 headings with distinct angles (financial benefits → legal rights → requirements → calculation → audience segmentation → risks → FAQ → conclusion) - distinct from typical procedural structures.
